title: Simple Aviator-Style Crash Game Demo

requirements.text: Create a single-page Aviator-style crash game demo in the React + TypeScript frontend that reproduces the provided behavior: a multiplier starts at 1.00x, increases by 0.05 every 100ms while running, and randomly crashes between 1.00x and 6.00x; include Start and Cash Out controls and show the outcome text (“Crashed at …x” or “Cashed out at …x”).

quotes:
✈ Simple Aviator Game (Demo)

1.00x

game bana ka r link de den

acceptanceCriteria: The UI shows a title “Simple Aviator Game (Demo)” and a multiplier display initialized at 1.00x.
Clicking Start begins the round; multiplier increases by 0.05 every 100ms and updates the display formatted to 2 decimals with an “x” suffix.
The game chooses a random crash point between 1.00x and 6.00x (inclusive range as implemented by 1 + Math.random()*5) and ends the round when multiplier reaches/exceeds it.
On crash, the UI displays exactly “Crashed at {crashPoint}x” (English text) with the crashPoint shown to 2 decimals.
Clicking Cash Out while running stops the round and displays exactly “Cashed out at {multiplier}x” with multiplier shown to 2 decimals.
Start cannot start a new round while a round is already running.

requirements.text: Add a cohesive, distinct visual theme for the demo (colors, typography, and layout) inspired by a dark “night sky cockpit” style; apply it consistently using Tailwind (avoid blue/purple as primary colors) while keeping the core UI minimal (title, multiplier, controls, result).
acceptanceCriteria: The app has a consistent dark theme with a clear accent color that is not primarily blue or purple.
Typography, spacing, and button styles look intentional and consistent across the page.
The multiplier display is visually emphasized (larger size, accent color) similar in prominence to the provided HTML demo.

requirements.text: Add generated static image assets for the game UI and render them from the frontend as static files under frontend/public/assets/generated (do not serve images from the backend).
acceptanceCriteria: All required generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated.
The UI renders at least one of the generated images (e.g., in the header or as a subtle background element) without any backend image routing.

requirements.text: Provide a simple “link to access it” via clear run/deploy instructions in project documentation (local and Internet Computer deployment), including where to find the local URL and the canister URL after deploy.

quotes: game bana ka r link de den

acceptanceCriteria: Documentation includes local run instructions and explicitly states the local URL to open the app.
Documentation includes Internet Computer deployment steps (dfx deploy) and explains how to obtain/open the deployed frontend canister URL.

constraints: Use English for any user-facing text.
Frontend must be React + TypeScript with Tailwind and existing UI components composed (do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui).
Backend must remain single-actor Motoko (no additional backend services).
Do not modify any immutable frontend hook files (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts/.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx).
nonGoals: Real-money gambling, payments, or wagering logic.
Provably-fair RNG, cryptographic randomness, or anti-cheat guarantees.
User accounts, leaderboards, multiplayer, or persistent game history.

required: Minimal airplane silhouette icon, flat vector style, mint accent on dark background (aviator-plane-icon.dim_256x256.png)
Wide night-sky gradient background with subtle stars and a faint horizon glow (aviator-sky-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
